findings.title: Installed on-the-fly via a package runner
findings.detail: Server 'pg-aiguide' is fetched and executed at launch via 'npx' with auto-accept flag(s) -y; package spec: @tigerdata/pg-aiguide.
findings.recommendation: Install the server as a pinned dependency and invoke the local binary, or vendor it. If a runner is unavoidable, pin an exact version (see unpinned_source).

findings.title: Package source is unpinned or mutable
findings.detail: Server 'pg-aiguide' package spec '@tigerdata/pg-aiguide' is unpinned (pin strength: none): no version specified (resolves to whatever the registry serves now).
findings.recommendation: Pin an exact version (pkg@1.2.3) or a git commit SHA. Avoid @latest and branch refs.

evidence.reason: no version specified (resolves to whatever the registry serves now)

findings.title: Server requires sensitive credentials
findings.detail: Server 'pg-aiguide' requires credential-like env keys: OPENAI_API_KEY, PGPASSWORD.
findings.recommendation: Confirm each credential is scoped to least privilege and rotatable. Note which tools can exfiltrate it.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search documentation with hybrid semantic (vector) and keyword (BM25) search. Use semanticWeight to choose keyword-only (0), semantic-only (1), or a blend; mid values fuse rankings with RRF. Supports Tiger Cloud (TimescaleDB), PostgreSQL, and PostGIS.

candidate_capabilities.title: Direct database / data-store access

evidence.snippet: Tiger Cloud and TimescaleDB, "postgres" for PostgreSQL, "postgis" fo

candidate_capabilities.rationale: Raw query access bypasses application-level authorization and tenant scoping; injection in a tool parameter reaches the data directly.
candidate_capabilities.validation_reason: The tool is a documentation search interface; 'postgres' refers to available documentation sources to search through, not direct database access capability.
